syntax_14515.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14515.title: Ask Groq AI
syntax_14515.description: Sends a prompt to the Groq LPU API using a specific model (Llama 3.3). This is an asynchronous effect, meaning it won't lag the server while waiting for the AI to respond.
syntax_14515.syntax_pattern: ask groq %string% with [api] key %string% [and system [role] %string%] and store [the] [result] in %objects%

en: Sends a prompt to the Groq LPU API using a specific model (Llama 3.3). This is an asynchronous effect, meaning it won't lag the server while waiting for the AI to respond.

syntax_14518.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14518.title: Personal World Border
syntax_14518.description: Creates a virtual world border that is only visible and active for specific players. This does not affect the actual global world border.
syntax_14518.syntax_pattern:
set [the] personal [world] border (of|for) %players% to center %location% with size %number%
(reset|clear) [the] personal [world] border (of|for) %players%

en: Creates a virtual world border that is only visible and active for specific players. This does not affect the actual global world border.

syntax_14519.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14519.title: Reset Hold State
syntax_14519.description: Forcefully resets the click-hold timer for a player. Useful for 'cancelling' a charge-up action or resetting state after a specific game event.
syntax_14519.syntax_pattern:
reset [click] hold [state] of %player%
clear [click] hold [timer] of %player%

en: Forcefully resets the click-hold timer for a player. Useful for 'cancelling' a charge-up action or resetting state after a specific game event.

syntax_14521.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14521.title: Hold Duration
syntax_14521.description: Returns the current time in milliseconds that a player has been holding down a click (Left or Right).

en: Returns the current time in milliseconds that a player has been holding down a click (Left or Right).

syntax_14514.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14514.title: Is Holding Click
syntax_14514.description: Checks if a player is currently holding down a specific mouse button. This relies on the ClickManager's tracked state.
syntax_14514.syntax_pattern:
%player% is holding [left|right] click
%player% is(n't| not) holding [left|right] click

en: Checks if a player is currently holding down a specific mouse button. This relies on the ClickManager's tracked state.

syntax_14516.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14516.title: Fake World Border
syntax_14516.description: Shows or removes a 'fake' world border effect for specific players. When shown, this typically creates a red vignette/warning effect on the player's screen without actually restricting their movement based on the global world border.

en: Shows or removes a 'fake' world border effect for specific players. When shown, this typically creates a red vignette/warning effect on the player's screen without actually restricting their movement based on the global world border.

syntax_14517.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14517.title: Open Paged Menu
syntax_14517.description: Opens a sophisticated paged GUI for a player. Automatically handles pagination, navigation buttons, and custom row sizes.
syntax_14517.syntax_pattern: open [a] paged menu named %string% with %number% row[s] using %itemstacks% to %player% [max pages %number%] [always show buttons] [with] buttons %itemstack% at %number% and %itemstack% at %number%

en: Opens a sophisticated paged GUI for a player. Automatically handles pagination, navigation buttons, and custom row sizes.

syntax_14520.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14520.title: Set Menu Slot
syntax_14520.description: Sets a specific slot in a player's currently open skGull PagedMenu to a given item. This updates both the internal menu state and the live inventory.

en: Sets a specific slot in a player's currently open skGull PagedMenu to a given item. This updates both the internal menu state and the live inventory.

syntax_14664.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14664.title: Emit RGB Potion Particles
syntax_14664.description: Spawns ENTITY_EFFECT particles with precise RGB color control. Compatible with Minecraft 1.21+.

en: Spawns ENTITY_EFFECT particles with precise RGB color control. Compatible with Minecraft 1.21+.

syntax_14665.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14665.title: Launch Physics Projectile
syntax_14665.description: Launches an entity that bounces off walls, floors, and ceilings with configurable energy retention.

en: Launches an entity that bounces off walls, floors, and ceilings with configurable energy retention.

syntax_14666.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14666.title: Tab Priority
syntax_14666.description: Sets the player's sorting priority in the tab list. Lower numbers appear higher up.
syntax_14666.syntax_pattern:
set tab [list] (priority|order|rank) of %players% to %number%
(reset|clear) tab [list] (priority|order|rank) of %players%

en: Sets the player's sorting priority in the tab list. Lower numbers appear higher up.

syntax_14404.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14404.title: Make Item Shiny
syntax_14404.description: Adds an enchantment glint (shiny effect) to an item. Uses the 1.21+ glint override with a legacy fallback (Enchantment + Hide Flags).

en: Adds an enchantment glint (shiny effect) to an item. Uses the 1.21+ glint override with a legacy fallback (Enchantment + Hide Flags).

syntax_14394.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14394.title: Is In Zone (Cuboid)
syntax_14394.description: Checks if an entity is within a cuboid region defined by two locations.

en: Checks if an entity is within a cuboid region defined by two locations.

syntax_14395.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14395.title: Is Visible
syntax_14395.description: Checks if a player has a clear line of sight to an entity (not blocked by walls).
syntax_14395.syntax_pattern:
%entity% is visible to %player%
%entity% is(n't| not) visible to %player%

en: Checks if a player has a clear line of sight to an entity (not blocked by walls).

syntax_14396.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14396.title: AI Control
syntax_14396.description: Enable or disable the AI (awareness) of one or more mobs. Disabled mobs will not move or target players.
syntax_14396.syntax_pattern:
(enable|turn on) [the] ai of %entities%
(disable|turn off) [the] ai of %entities%

en: Enable or disable the AI (awareness) of one or more mobs. Disabled mobs will not move or target players.

syntax_14397.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14397.title: Animate Armor Stand
syntax_14397.description:
Smoothly animates a specific part of an armor stand to a new rotation over a period of ticks.
Indices: 0:head, 1:body, 2:left arm, 3:right arm, 4:left leg, 5:right leg

en:
Smoothly animates a specific part of an armor stand to a new rotation over a period of ticks.
Indices: 0:head, 1:body, 2:left arm, 3:right arm, 4:left leg, 5:right leg

syntax_14400.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14400.title: Emit Sound Loop
syntax_14400.description: Causes an entity to emit a specific sound at regular intervals. If a sound is already being emitted, starting a new one will replace it.
syntax_14400.syntax_pattern:
emit %string% from %entity% every %timespan% [with volume %number%] [with pitch %number%]
stop emitting [sounds] from %entity%

en: Causes an entity to emit a specific sound at regular intervals. If a sound is already being emitted, starting a new one will replace it.

syntax_14401.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14401.title: Entity Door Power
syntax_14401.description:
Allows or disallows an entity from opening and passing through doors.
This increases the mob's follow range and updates their pathfinding flags.
It also enables a physical door-opening task if the 'allow' syntax is used.
syntax_14401.syntax_pattern:
allow %entity% to (pass|open) doors
disallow %entity% from (passing|opening) doors

en:
Allows or disallows an entity from opening and passing through doors.
This increases the mob's follow range and updates their pathfinding flags.
It also enables a physical door-opening task if the 'allow' syntax is used.

syntax_14402.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14402.title: Force Entity Patrol
syntax_14402.description: Forces a mob to indefinitely patrol a list of locations. If the mob acquires a target, it will pause the patrol to fight, then resume once the target is lost.

en: Forces a mob to indefinitely patrol a list of locations. If the mob acquires a target, it will pause the patrol to fight, then resume once the target is lost.

syntax_14403.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14403.title: Make Item Dull
syntax_14403.description: Removes the enchantment glint (shiny effect) from an item, including the 1.21+ glint override.

en: Removes the enchantment glint (shiny effect) from an item, including the 1.21+ glint override.

syntax_14399.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14399.title: Delete Zone
syntax_14399.description: Removes an existing zone by its name.

en: Removes an existing zone by its name.

syntax_14392.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14392.title: On Player See Entity
syntax_14392.description: Triggers the exact moment an entity enters a player's field of view and is not obstructed by blocks. (Works best with default FOV)

en: Triggers the exact moment an entity enters a player's field of view and is not obstructed by blocks. (Works best with default FOV)

syntax_14393.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14393.title: On Zone Boundary
syntax_14393.description: Triggers once an entity enters/exit a set zone.

en: Triggers once an entity enters/exit a set zone.

syntax_14405.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14405.title: Pathfind Entity
syntax_14405.description: Calculates and executes a path for an entity to a specific location using the built-in Minecraft pathfinder.
syntax_14405.syntax_pattern:
pathfind %entity% to %location% [at speed %number%]
make %entity% pathfind to %location% [at speed %number%]

en: Calculates and executes a path for an entity to a specific location using the built-in Minecraft pathfinder.

syntax_14406.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14406.title: Set Entity Path
syntax_14406.description: Forces a mob to follow a list of locations sequentially. The pathing will pause if the mob acquires a combat target and resume once the target is cleared.
syntax_14406.syntax_pattern: force %entity% to follow path %locations% at speed %number%

en: Forces a mob to follow a list of locations sequentially. The pathing will pause if the mob acquires a combat target and resume once the target is cleared.

syntax_14407.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14407.title: Sphere Raycast
syntax_14407.description: Performs a 'thick' raycast (sphere-based) from a location to detect entities and blocks, with an optional result storage.
syntax_14407.syntax_pattern: sphere raycast from %location% with radius %number% for %number% blocks [and store [result] in %objects%]

en: Performs a 'thick' raycast (sphere-based) from a location to detect entities and blocks, with an optional result storage.

syntax_14409.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14409.title: Hit Part
syntax_14409.description: Returns the specific part of an entity (head, body, or feet) that was hit/looked at in a look event.

en: Returns the specific part of an entity (head, body, or feet) that was hit/looked at in a look event.

syntax_14398.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14398.title: Create Zone
syntax_14398.description: Creates and registers a new zone using two locations as the corners of a cuboid.

en: Creates and registers a new zone using two locations as the corners of a cuboid.

syntax_14408.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14408.title: All Active Zones
syntax_14408.description: Returns a list of all currently active zones.

en: Returns a list of all currently active zones.

syntax_14391.creator: SerratedGull
syntax_14391.title: On Player Looking At Entity
syntax_14391.description: Is a continuous state check that triggers repeatedly as long as the player keeps an entity in their sight

en: Is a continuous state check that triggers repeatedly as long as the player keeps an entity in their sight
